text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back from an outing, I suggest to
Oguri Cap that she help out at a store as a way of
tackling her awkwardness with groups.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is this the store? Look at all these regional
specialties... They must bring them in from all
over the country.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They've even got some stuff from my hometown...
This sure brings back good memories.

text_block_list.name: Kindly Lady A
text_block_list.text: Are you the one who's helping us out today?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. Thank you for having me here
today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap finishes getting ready and heads over
to her assigned position, eyes brimming with
determination.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This is perfect. I'm sure I'll be able to interact with
lots of people my age by working here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That said, I don't have any experience with
customer service... Do you think I'll be okay?
choice_data_list:
Just pretend the customers are people from
your hometown!

Just pretend the customers are people from
your hometown!
Imagine all the customers are carrots!
Imagine all the customers are carrots!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That said, I don't have any experience with
customer service... Do you think I'll be okay?
choice_data_list:
Just pretend the customers are people from
your hometown!

Just pretend the customers are people from
your hometown!
Imagine all the customers are carrots!
Imagine all the customers are carrots!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... That just might work...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll give it a shot.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hmm... What should we get?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I want something to munch on...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for snacks, I recommend the
mochi. They're packed full of fruit!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The tartness goes really well with both the rich
bean paste and sweet cream options. You can't
go wrong either way.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Ooh, sounds tasty!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They really are. I tried one for myself just a
moment ago, and I couldn't believe how sweet it
was!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, you could go for some of these
cleat-shaped cookies. Eating them before a race
always gives me a boost.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Before a race? Come to think of it, you look
familiar.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Wait, I know! Aren't you Oguri Cap?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! No way! I went to your last race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You work part-time on the side? Sounds rough,
but keep it up! We're all behind you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks... I'll try as hard at this job as I do with
racing. If there's anything else you need help
with, please don't hesitate to ask.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Oguri Cap continues to handle her
customers with confidence and grace.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Carrots, huh? Carrots... Carrots...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: The customers are carrots... All right, got it!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! How come this doll comes in so many
different colors?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I was wondering that too!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
These dolls bring different kinds of good luck
depending on the color. Take the carrot one, for
example...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: The carrot one?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The saying goes that you'll be blessed with the
opportunity to eat lots of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You'll get to eat big carrots... and soft, juicy carrots too... Mrmgh...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I'm not really sure, but I think I just felt a chill run
down my spine...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If there are any other carro—I mean, colors that strike your fancy, just let me know! I'll bite—I mean, be happy to help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that strange interaction, Oguri Cap
continues to sink her teeth into the world of
customer service.
